title: muscarimia flava
intro: Muscarimia flava, also known as the yellow muscaria, is a species of mushroom belonging to the Russulaceae family. It is believed to have various medicinal properties, including antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Muscarimia flava include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Muscarimia flava typically involve drying and powdering the mushrooms, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a supplement.
